name: Baby Glowing Lotion
desc: A gentle daily body lotion designed to nourish, hydrate, and soften children's skin while supporting a healthy, natural-looking glow. Its lightweight texture absorbs easily, leaving skin feeling smooth, moisturised, and comfortable throughout the day.
benefits: Helps keep skin soft and smooth
Leaves skin feeling fresh and nourished
use: Apply generously to clean skin after bathing or whenever moisture is needed. Massage gently until fully absorbed. For best results, use daily as part of the Baby Glow skincare routine.

name: Baby Glow Oil
desc: A lightweight nourishing body oil specially formulated to help keep children's skin soft, moisturised, and naturally radiant. Baby Glow Oil absorbs comfortably into the skin and is ideal for daily care, leaving the skin feeling smooth, healthy, and refreshed.
benefits: Leaves skin feeling soft and smooth
use: Apply a small amount onto clean skin and massage gently until fully absorbed. Use after bathing or whenever the skin needs extra moisture. For best results, use consistently as part of your daily skincare routine.

name: Flawless Face Cream
desc: Flawless Face Cream is a luxurious daily facial moisturiser formulated to help keep your skin smooth, hydrated, and naturally radiant. Its rich yet comfortable texture melts into the skin, providing lasting moisture while promoting a fresh, healthy-looking complexion.
use: Apply a small amount to clean, dry skin after cleansing. Massage gently over the face and neck using upward circular motions. Use morning and evening as part of your daily skincare routine.

name: Stretchmark Oil
desc: Stretchmark Oil is a nourishing body oil specially developed to improve skin hydration and elasticity while helping reduce the appearance of stretch marks. Its lightweight formula absorbs comfortably into the skin, making it an excellent addition to your daily body care routine.
benefits: Helps reduce the appearance of stretch marks
Deeply nourishes and moisturises the skin
Leaves skin feeling soft and smooth
use: Apply a few drops directly to clean, dry skin and massage gently using circular motions until fully absorbed. Use morning and evening for best results. Consistent daily use is recommended.

name: Whitening Kojic Acid Soap
desc: Whitening Kojic Acid Soap is a luxurious cleansing bar designed to gently cleanse the skin while promoting a brighter, smoother, and more radiant-looking complexion. Suitable for both face and body, it removes impurities without leaving the skin feeling stripped, making it an excellent choice for everyday skincare.
benefits: Helps reduce the appearance of dark spots
Promotes a clearer, more radiant complexion
use: Wet the skin and the soap with clean water. Work into a rich lather and gently massage over the face or body. Rinse thoroughly with water. Follow with a moisturiser. Use once or twice daily based on your skincare routine.

name: Baby Glow Complete Collection
desc: The Baby Glow Complete Collection brings together Maya's Secret's essential baby skincare products in one nourishing routine. Designed for gentle daily care, this complete set helps cleanse, moisturise, and nourish delicate skin, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and naturally radiant.
benefits: Gently cleanses and moisturises the skin
use:
Step 1: Cleanse the skin using the Baby Glow Soap and rinse thoroughly.

Step 2: Apply Baby Glow Lotion to moisturise the skin.

Step 3: Finish with Baby Glow Oil to help lock in moisture and leave the skin feeling soft and nourished.

Use daily for best results.

name: Signature Glow Set
desc: A focused three-step face ritual for cleansing, hydration and everyday radiance.
benefits: A coordinated routine in one set
Ideal for gifting or starting a new ritual
use: Use as directed on clean skin. Contact Maya’s Secret for personalised guidance if you are managing a specific skin concern.

name: Body Renewal Set
desc: A complete body ritual pairing exfoliation, deep moisture and a luminous finishing oil.
benefits: A coordinated routine in one set
Ideal for gifting or starting a new ritual
use: Use as directed on clean skin. Contact Maya’s Secret for personalised guidance if you are managing a specific skin concern.
